autoscaling_policy.description: Defines parameters for autoscaling, including replica limits, utilization targets, and scaling schedules. Ensure min_replicas is less than max_replicas, and target values are appropriate for workload demands.
autoscaling_policy.type: list(object({cooldown_period: optional(number),max_replicas: number,min_replicas: number,mode: optional(string),cpu_utilization: list(object({predictive_method: optional(string),target: number})),load_balancing_utilization: list(object({target: number})),metric: list(object({filter: optional(string),name: string,single_instance_assignment: optional(number),target: optional(number),type: optional(string)})),scale_in_control: list(object({time_window_sec: optional(number),max_scaled_in_replicas: list(object({fixed: optional(number),percent: optional(number)}))})),scaling_schedules: list(object({description: optional(string),disabled: optional(bool),duration_sec: number,min_required_replicas: number,name: string,schedule: string,time_zone: optional(string)}))}))

description.description: Provides a human-readable explanation or details about the resource or configuration. Typically required for documentation and clarity.

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource, which must be unique within the project or region. Typically used for identification purposes.

target.description: Indicates the target resource or endpoint for this configuration, such as a load balancer or compute instance. Must match the intended resource identifier.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations. Use appropriate values to avoid timing issues for long-running processes.

zone.description: Defines the zone where the resource is located. Use valid zone identifiers matching the cloud provider's supported regions.
